title: TUCCI by GreenPan Launches at Williams Sonoma

Made in Italy at GreenPan's high-tech factory, these pans blend refined architectural details with pioneering technology. title: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. declares quarterly cash dividend
text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.90 per common share. The dividend is payable on November 24, 2023, to stockholders of record as of the close of business on October 20, 2023. ABOUT WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC.
